title: Is there a plugin for automated mass emails to clients with PDF attachments and image signatures?
excerpt:
I’m looking for a plugin to help with the automated delivery of bulk emails to clients. This plugin should allow me to include a PDF attachment and an image-based signature after the email’s body. 
Are there any plugins …

posts.author: Osmond (Udayanga Osmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking for a plugin to help with the automated delivery of bulk emails to clients. This plugin should allow me to include a PDF attachment and an image-based signature after the email’s body.

Are there any plugins available that can automate the sending of mass emails to clients, allowing for the inclusion of a PDF attachment and the addition of an image-based signature after the email’s content?

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Osmond

Welcome to the community! You can achieve this with the ‘Emails & Activities’ feature and the use of the Public Files app.

Let me know if you want a demo!

Have a great weekend,
Peta | upstream
peta@upstreamtech.io
